prompt: The button listener is never called. What is the bug?
choices: ActionListener must be set with btn.setActionListener, not addActionListener
The listener lambda is created but never registered; btn.addActionListener(listener) was never called, so clicking the button does nothing
JButton event listeners must be added before the JFrame is created
Lambda expressions cannot be used as ActionListeners; an anonymous class is required
explanation: Creating an ActionListener object does not register it anywhere. You must call btn.addActionListener(listener) to attach it to the button. Without this call, no listener is notified when the button is clicked. Fix: add btn.addActionListener(listener); before or after adding the button to the frame.
